fields.helpText: This field uniquely identifies a system or group of linked machines supported by a single vendor and sharing the same system requirements.

fields.setOfCodes: O:ONE NAME PER ITEM;S:STATION SPECIFIC ALLOWED;
fields.helpText: This field will be used to assist GIP in determining what information related to an item should be passed to the supply station and when.
This field will store the VA HL7 logical link for this supply station vendor.
